title: docs: update README — 2026-07-21
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News section. (Recent Apps is refreshed by Apps / Update metrics.)

gist.headline: Fresh pollen on the README
gist.blurb: The README's Latest News patch got its daily tending. The front door now has fresher notes pinned to it.
gist.summary: Updated the README's Latest News section for July 21, 2026, while Recent Apps continues to refresh through app metrics.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will see the current project news in the README's regularly maintained overview.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy open-source garden noticeboard represents the README's Latest News section: Polly, wearing a tiny librarian scarf, pins fresh lime-green pixel notes beside blooming code-plants while a retro terminal quietly updates the board.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny librarian scarf, pinning fresh news notes to a garden README noticeboard beside blooming code-plants and a softly glowing retro terminal. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic with a prominent lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream pastel gradient, dark purple (#110518) outlines, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes; simple pixel-font text: 'LATEST NEWS'.
